commands.command: node $SNAP_LOCAL_REGISTRY -- vp create @your-org:with-build-dep --no-interactive --approve-builds --package-manager yarn --directory approved-app # yarn (Berry) blocks build scripts by default, so --approve-builds enables the gated build (core-js) via dependenciesMeta.built and reinstalls

commands: cat approved-app/package.json # core-js recorded under dependenciesMeta.built

commands.command: node $SNAP_LOCAL_REGISTRY -- vp create @your-org:with-build-dep --no-interactive --package-manager yarn --directory default-app # default run surfaces the gated build with guidance, leaving it disabled

commands: cat default-app/package.json # no dependenciesMeta, the build was not run
